subject: [PATCH v5 10/36] mm/madvise: disallow madvise operations on private node folios

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch prevents madvise operations from being performed on private node memory by adding filters to the huge pages and zone device locations. It does this by checking if a folio is part of a private node before allowing madvise operations, effectively disallowing these operations on such memory. This change aims to prevent potential issues that could arise from madvise operations on private node memory.
